subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou ever be favored through the loving-kindness of the Eternal Beloved and attain unto the horizon of His Cause, which is the Dawning-Place of the lights of His commandments [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لازال بعنایت محبوب بیزوال فائز باشی و به افق امر که مطلع انوار احکام است
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @high station of the true believer, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Satan; the Evil One
